nasb.text: But transgressors and sinners will be crushed together, And those who forsake the Lord will come to an end.

esv.text: But rebels and sinners shall be broken together, and those who forsake the Lord shall be consumed.

cnv.text: 但悖逆的和犯罪的，必一同滅亡， 離棄耶和華的，也必滅亡。

ccb.text: 但叛逆之辈和犯罪之徒必遭毁灭， 背弃耶和华的人必灭亡。

csbs.text: 但叛逆者和罪人必一同败亡， 离弃耶和华的必将灭绝。
